title: MFFU vs Tradeify (2026): Sibling Lock, Different Forks
description: MyFundedFutures vs Tradeify — both lock at SB + $100 and both fork at signup. MFFU bundles trail-type with consistency per plan (Core/Rapid/Pro). Tradeify keeps trail uniform and forks on consistency archetype only. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: MFFU vs Tradeify (2026): Sibling Lock, Different Forks
og.description: MFFU and Tradeify share the rare SB+$100 lock floor, $0 activation, and 5-day payout cadence — but fork on coupling shape: MFFU bundles trail+consistency per plan, Tradeify isolates consistency only. Worked examples of which sibling fits which trader.
